title: Is there an integration between moday and Microsoft To Do?

posts.author: LindaRosado (LindaRosado)
posts.cookedHtml: The company where I work use Outlook and they have this feature call To Do that is connected with my Outlook account. I wanna know if there is a way to connect my To Do with Monday and if it’s not I amply encourage the Monday team to do so.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I am with zzBots. With our Microsoft To Do and Monday.com 2-Way sync you can ensure your tasks and items stay in sync and up to date with each other in realtime.

Here is a link: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-microsoft-to-do-2-way-sync
